tagline: Turn up now: Music Is My Drug.
liner: This driving D major dance-pop anthem at 129 bpm explores music as a powerful life-saving substance that transforms pain into euphoria. Starting with intimate verses, the track builds to a massive chorus where strangers unite through rhythm. The rolling bassline and punchy drums create an intense physical sensation, while anthemic vocals deliver catharsis and vitality. As intensity rises from 0.12 to explosive peaks of one pure joy, listeners experience escapism and unity in sound. This journey turns silence into gold and makes broken things shine under the rhythm.
worldCaption: A euphoric dance-pop world where basslines run through chests, strangers become a single soul, and pain transforms into vibrant motion and c

bios.lead: Voice ignites anthemic fire within every breath taken.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking without ever missing a downbeat.
bios.other: Weaves atmospheric layers that elevate emotional intensity.
